history.name: Louvre Museum
history.description: A world-class museum inside a former palace, home to masterpieces like the Mona Lisa.

family.name: Eiffel Tower
family.description: Paris's iconic iron tower with city views, lawns, and evening illumination.

food.name: Le Marais
food.description: A historic neighborhood known for cafes, bakeries, falafel, and boutique dining.

history.name: Tower of London
history.description: A medieval fortress with crown jewels, royal history, and riverside views.

family.name: British Museum
family.description: A landmark museum with global antiquities, mummies, sculptures, and cultural treasures.

shopping.name: Covent Garden
shopping.description: A lively district for shops, street performers, cafes, and theatre atmosphere.

history.name: Colosseum
history.description: Ancient Rome's monumental amphitheatre, known for gladiator history and engineering.

history.name: Roman Forum
history.description: Ruins of temples, basilicas, and public spaces at the heart of ancient Rome.

food.name: Trastevere
food.description: A charming neighborhood known for trattorias, gelato, and evening dining.

family.name: Burj Khalifa
family.description: The world's tallest tower with observation decks and skyline views.

shopping.name: Dubai Mall
shopping.description: A massive mall with luxury shops, dining, aquarium, and fountain access.

adventure.name: Dubai Desert Safari
adventure.description: A desert outing with dunes, sunset camps, and cultural performances.

family.name: Gardens by the Bay
family.description: Futuristic gardens with Supertrees, conservatories, and evening light shows.

nature.name: Singapore Botanic Gardens
nature.description: A UNESCO-listed tropical garden known for orchids and shaded walking paths.

food.name: Lau Pa Sat
food.description: A historic hawker centre famous for satay street, local dishes, and night dining.

history.name: Senso-ji Temple
history.description: Tokyo's oldest temple, approached through Nakamise shopping street in Asakusa.

shopping.name: Shibuya Crossing
shopping.description: A famous urban crossing surrounded by shopping, cafes, screens, and nightlife.

family.name: Tokyo Skytree
family.description: A tall broadcasting tower with observation decks and panoramic city views.

temples.name: Wat Arun
temples.description: A riverside temple known for its porcelain-decorated spire and sunset views.

history.name: Grand Palace
history.description: A royal complex with ornate halls, courtyards, and the Temple of the Emerald Buddha.

food.name: Yaowarat Road
food.description: Bangkok's Chinatown food street known for seafood, noodles, and late-night snacks.

temples.name: Tanah Lot
temples.description: A sea temple set on a rocky outcrop, especially popular at sunset.

nature.name: Tegalalang Rice Terrace
nature.description: Layered rice fields near Ubud with walking paths and valley views.

beaches.name: Seminyak Beach
beaches.description: A stylish beach area known for sunsets, cafes, surf, and beach clubs.

family.name: Times Square
family.description: A bright Midtown landmark known for screens, Broadway energy, and city buzz.

nature.name: Central Park
nature.description: A vast urban park with lakes, lawns, bridges, museums, and seasonal scenery.

history.name: Statue of Liberty
history.description: A symbolic harbor monument reached by ferry, paired with Ellis Island history.

family.name: Griffith Observatory
family.description: A hilltop observatory with city views, space exhibits, and Hollywood Sign vistas.

beaches.name: Santa Monica Pier
beaches.description: A classic oceanfront pier with rides, shops, and Pacific sunset views.

history.name: Hollywood Walk of Fame
history.description: A famous boulevard celebrating film, music, and entertainment icons.

history.name: Hagia Sophia
history.description: A landmark monument blending Byzantine and Ottoman layers of history.

shopping.name: Grand Bazaar
shopping.description: A historic covered market for carpets, lamps, spices, jewelry, and souvenirs.

nature.name: Bosphorus Cruise
nature.description: A scenic cruise between Europe and Asia with palaces, bridges, and waterfront views.

family.name: Sydney Opera House
family.description: A world-famous performing arts venue with harbor views and architectural tours.

beaches.name: Bondi Beach
beaches.description: A lively beach known for surf culture, coastal walks, cafes, and ocean views.

nature.name: Royal Botanic Garden Sydney
nature.description: A harborside garden with walking paths and views of the Opera House.

nature.name: Lake Zurich
nature.description: A scenic lakefront with promenades, boat rides, and mountain-framed views.

history.name: Old Town Zurich
history.description: A walkable historic core with guild houses, churches, lanes, and riverside cafes.

shopping.name: Bahnhofstrasse
shopping.description: A famous shopping street known for luxury stores, Swiss brands, and cafes.

history.name: Sagrada Familia
history.description: Gaudi's extraordinary basilica known for organic forms, towers, and stained glass.

shopping.name: La Rambla
shopping.description: A central pedestrian boulevard with markets, performers, cafes, and city energy.

beaches.name: Barceloneta Beach
beaches.description: A city beach with seafood restaurants, cycling paths, and Mediterranean views.

history.name: Rijksmuseum
history.description: A major Dutch museum with Rembrandt, Vermeer, and Golden Age collections.

relaxation.description: A UNESCO-listed canal network best explored by walks or a relaxed boat cruise.

family.name: Anne Frank House
family.description: A moving museum preserving the wartime hiding place and story of Anne Frank.

history.name: Gyeongbokgung Palace
history.description: A grand Joseon palace complex with gates, courtyards, and guard ceremonies.

shopping.name: Myeongdong
shopping.description: A busy shopping district known for cosmetics, street food, and bright evening streets.

nature.description: A hilltop tower with city views, walking paths, and night skyline scenes.

family.description: A famous viewpoint over Hong Kong's skyline, harbor, and surrounding hills.

shopping.description: A lively night market with stalls, snacks, fortune tellers, and local atmosphere.

nature.description: A classic harbor crossing with skyline views between Kowloon and Hong Kong Island.

beaches.description: A local island beach with turquoise water, guesthouses, and lagoon views.

adventure.description: A reef snorkeling experience with clear water, coral gardens, and tropical fish.
